title: UIPM Championships in Mossel Bay: What you need to know
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - As Mossel Bay gets...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - As Mossel Bay gets ready to host the Internationale de Pentathlon Moderne's (UIPM) first-ever combined biathle, triathle and laser run world championships at Santos Beach this week, 8 to 13 December, there are a few things residents and visitors should know.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - As Mossel Bay gets ready to host the Internationale de Pentathlon Moderne's (UIPM) first-ever combined biathle, triathle and laser run world championships at Santos Beach this week, 8 to 13 December, there are a few things residents and visitors should know."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The championships, presented by the South African Modern Pentathlon Association (Sampa) and the UIPM, which will see able-bodied athletes and para-athletes come together for the event, will begin at 07:00 tomorrow morning, 8 December, the first heat ending at 19:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The heats and then the finals will continue at these times at Santos Beach until the event concludes on 13 December.","html":"The heats and then the finals will continue at these times at Santos Beach until the event concludes on 13 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Public entry is free.","html":"Public entry is free."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality has said that limited access restrictions at Santos will apply during the event.\"Beach-goers are still welcome to enjoy the beach at their leisure, outside of the demarcated areas,\" it said.","html":"The Mossel Bay Municipality has said that limited access restrictions at Santos will apply during the event.
\"Beach-goers are still welcome to enjoy the beach at their leisure, outside of the demarcated areas,\" it said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Santos Beach's parking area was closed on Friday 5 December, and will remain closed until 13 December.","html":"Santos Beach's parking area was closed on Friday 5 December, and will remain closed until 13 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Amplified sound has been approved for the event and noise control exemption has also been granted for the duration of the championships.","html":"Amplified sound has been approved for the event and noise control exemption has also been granted for the duration of the championships."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The full event notice is available at www.mosselbay.gov.za. Enquiries: 044 606 5000 or [email protected].","html":"The full event notice is available at www.mosselbay.gov.za. Enquiries: 044 606 5000 or [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article: Mossel Bay gears up for biathle, triathle and laser run world champs","html":"Previous article: Mossel Bay gears up for biathle, triathle and laser run world champs"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
